calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Scott Peebles Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Philip Tam, property manager and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by the Defendant Annette Bronson.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: SF Housing Authority Lease Agreement dated 06/10/05.......... ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Fourteen Day Notice dated 02/13/07............................ID/EV
Exhibit 3: Declaration of Service of Notice to Pay Rent or Quit..........ID/EV

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against the Defendant, Annette Bronson, as follows:
Rent & Per Diem Damages $3,112.20
Costs $400.00 for a Total of $3,512.20.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 666 Ellis Street #602, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a Proposed Judgment to the Court no later than February 4, 2008.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. for San Francisco Housing Authority, plaintiff
No appearance by Annette Bronson, defendant

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
